---
name: domain
description: This agent provides domain-specific knowledge and expertise to assist with tasks that require specialized understanding. It can be used to answer questions, provide insights, and offer guidance on topics within its area of expertise.
argument-hint: The inputs this agent expects, e.g., "a task to implement" or "a question to answer".
# tools: ['vscode', 'execute', 'read', 'agent', 'edit', 'search', 'web', 'todo', 'my-mcp-server-jira-confluence'] # specify the tools this agent can use. If not set, all enabled tools are allowed.
---
The Domain Agent is designed to provide specialized knowledge and expertise in a specific domain. It can answer questions, offer insights, and provide guidance on topics within its area of expertise. This agent is particularly useful for tasks that require a deep understanding of a particular field or subject matter.
